targets.notes: Science-based target to cut absolute Scope 1 and 2 greenhouse gas emissions 75% from a 2013 base year by 2030.
targets.title: 75% reduction in Scope 1 and 2 emissions by 2030 from a 2013 base year

targets.boundary: Company-wide across Scope 1, 2, and 3 (operations and value chain).
targets.notes: Goal to be carbon negative by 2030, removing more carbon than is emitted each year across Scopes 1–3 through emission reductions and carbon removal.
targets.title: Carbon negative across Scopes 1–3 by 2030

targets.boundary: Removal of all historical Scope 1 and 2 emissions from 1975 onward.
targets.notes: Commitment to remove from the atmosphere by 2050 all carbon emitted from Scope 1 and 2 since the company’s founding in 1975.
targets.title: Remove all historical Scope 1 and 2 emissions since 1975 by 2050
